_comment: Sustained reach standoff (#240 phase 2): a stationary Spearmen regiment (reach 48wu) holds ground while an Infantry/sword regiment (reach 26wu) marches up under its own enemy-AI order and locks in melee. Watches whether the spear holds a wider gap and keeps landing hits while the sword's hit rate is suppressed, instead of both sides collapsing to the same distance the way the pre-fix regiment-level physics did.
